sp_widget.name: SmartCare Bed Tile
sp_widget.template:
{{bed.bedId}} {{c.getWardLabel(bed.ward) | uppercase}}
⋮
{{bed.statusValue == 'occupied' ? 'OCCUPIED' : 'READY FOR ADMISSION'}}

{{bed.patientName}}

{{bed.dept}}

{{bed.severity}}

No beds match your current filters.

Showing {{(c.currentPage - 1) * c.pageSize + 1}}-{{c.getMin(c.currentPage * c.pageSize, c.filteredBeds.length)}} of {{c.filteredBeds.length}} beds
